head.title: Developments | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: We work with developers and occupiers on projects of all sizes, across Yorkshire and the Uganda. From large-scale regeneration sites to smaller infill schemes, we support you through the full development cycle. Our team brings sharp legal insight, sector experience and a proactive, problem-solving mindset. We help you plan ahead, avoid delays and unlock transactions to keep your project moving. We work as part of your team, helping you deliver on time and on budget.

blocks.html:
Developments

We work with developers and occupiers on projects of all sizes, across Yorkshire and the Uganda. From large-scale regeneration sites to smaller infill schemes, we support you through the full development cycle. Our team brings sharp legal insight, sector experience and a proactive, problem-solving mindset. We help you plan ahead, avoid delays and unlock transactions to keep your project moving. We work as part of your team, helping you deliver on time and on budget.

Speak to an expert

Home
For businesses
Developments

Site assembly

We help acquire bare land to multiple derelict premises through options, conditional/promotion agreements or outright acquisition. We implement the right strategy to secure the site with the best legal title.

‍

Build-out

From development agreements and third-party contracts to bespoke service charges and overage, we handle the legal detail that underpins your build. Our advice is clear, commercial and focused on making things work in practice.

‍

Construction

We support you by drafting building contracts, service agreements, appointments, collateral warranties and more. We’ll help you minimise risk and avoid disputes before they arise.

‍

Occupation

If you’re developing for occupation, we can structure pre-let and forward sale agreements to suit your needs. We’ll help you address issues like practical completion, defects and rent calculations.

‍

Finance

Finance is essential for development. We provide title due diligence and support your funders’ reporting needs. We’ll work quickly to keep cash flowing and the project on track.

‍

Investment

It’s crucial to understand how developments generate profit. Whether it’s grant funding or forward funding, we’ll make sure the structure works commercially. We focus on payment terms, income protection and maintaining the capital asset to protect your investment.

‍
